summary: Dashboard features testing complete. All 8 backend tests passed. All UI verifications passed. Date range shows DD/MM/YYYY format, Software Capabilities removed, stat cards display correct values, manual download buttons functional with correct PDF links.

✓ /api/stats endpoint returns total_items field (364 unique items)
✓ Dashboard formatDateDDMMYYYY function correctly converts YYYY-MM-DD to DD/MM/YYYY
✓ Software Capabilities (ScopeSection) component completely removed from Dashboard.jsx
✓ Static PDF files accessible at /manuals/StockBud_Manual_EN.pdf and /manuals/StockBud_Manual_HI.pdf
✓ Both PDFs return HTTP 200 with content-type: application/pdf
✓ Manual download buttons have data-testid attributes for testing
✓ Date range banner shows '15/01/2026 to 02/03/2026' in DD/MM/YYYY format
✓ Stamp Verification table shows dates in DD/MM/YYYY format (e.g., 09/03/2026)
